name: Harness diagram explains the loop topology
description: A THE HARNESS section at the bottom of the page shows a cycle diagram: WRITE flows to VERIFY; a green pass connector leads to BANK; a red fail connector drops to LESSON, which loops back to WRITE.

planSteps.description: Scroll to the THE HARNESS section near the bottom of the page

Verify a diagram inside a bordered panel shows four labeled boxes — WRITE (maker), VERIFY (checker), BANK (durable suite), LESSON (LESSONS.md) — with WRITE, VERIFY, and BANK in a top row and LESSON below VERIFY
Verify the connector from VERIFY to BANK is green and labeled 'pass', and a red connector labeled 'fail' leads from VERIFY down to LESSON and back toward WRITE, forming a visible loop
